title: Lebanese turtle conservationist Mona Khalil killed by Israeli strike
summary_full: Mona Khalil, who had refused to leave the beach she had spent years protecting, died after several days in hospital, an environmental group said.
summary_public: Mona Khalil, who had refused to leave the beach she had spent years protecting, died after several days in hospital, an environmental group said.
